languages.text: Колония на Заркове не получила ни единого шанса устоять перед силами божественной провозвестни{mf|ка|цы} Осколка: планету разорвали растущими из-под ее коры корнями, а все ее жители — уничтожены.
The colony on Zarkov had no hope of resisting the forces of the Shard's divine harbinger: the planet was torn apart by the roots growing under its crust, and all its inhabitants were destroyed.
languages.original_text: Колония на Заркове не получила ни единого шанса устоять перед силами божественной провозвестни{mf|ка|цы} Осколка: планету разорвали растущими из-под ее коры корнями, а все ее жители — уничтожены.

traits.locale_text: The colony on Zarkov had no hope of resisting the forces of the Shard's divine harbinger: the planet was torn apart by the roots growing under its crust, and all its inhabitants were destroyed.

The colony on Zarkov had no hope of resisting the forces of the Shard's divine harbinger: the planet was torn apart by the roots growing under its crust, and all its inhabitants were destroyed.

languages.text: ザルコフのコロニーには、シャードの神なる先触れの軍勢に抗する望みなどなかった――惑星はその地殻の下に伸びる根によって引き裂かれ、その住民はことごとく滅ぼされたのである。
languages.original_text: The colony on Zarkov had no hope of resisting the forces of the Shard's divine harbinger: the planet was torn apart by the roots growing under its crust, and all its inhabitants were destroyed.

traits.locale_text: ザルコフのコロニーは、シャードの神の使者である軍勢に抵抗する望みもなかった。惑星は地殻の下に生えた根によって引き裂かれ、その住民は皆滅した。
ザルコフのコロニーには、シャードの神なる先触れの軍勢に抗する望みなどなかった――惑星はその地殻の下に伸びる根によって引き裂かれ、その住民はことごとく滅ぼされたのである。

languages.text: 扎尔科夫的殖民地根本无力抵抗星神碎片使者的大军。这颗行星被地壳下疯长的根须撕裂，所有居民无一幸免。
languages.original_text: The colony on Zarkov had no hope of resisting the forces of the Shard's divine harbinger: the planet was torn apart by the roots growing under its crust, and all its inhabitants were destroyed.

traits.locale_text: 扎尔科夫的殖民地根本无力抵抗星神碎片使者的大军。这颗行星被地壳下疯长的根须撕裂，所有居民无一幸免。

languages.text: La colonie de Zarkov n'avait aucune chance de résister aux forces du héraut divin de l'Écharde : les racines qui poussaient sous la surface dévastèrent la planète et tuèrent tous ses habitants.
languages.original_text: The colony on Zarkov had no hope of resisting the forces of the Shard's divine harbinger: the planet was torn apart by the roots growing under its crust, and all its inhabitants were destroyed.

traits.locale_text: La colonie de Zarkov n'avait aucune chance de résister aux forces du héraut divin de l'Écharde : les racines qui poussaient sous la surface dévastèrent la planète et tuèrent tous ses habitants.

languages.text: La colonia de Zarkov jamás podría haber resistido el poder de{mf|l| la} heraldo divin{mf|o|a} del fragmento: las raíces que crecían bajo la superficie del planeta lo destrozaron y todos sus habitantes fueron aniquilados.
languages.original_text: The colony on Zarkov had no hope of resisting the forces of the Shard's divine harbinger: the planet was torn apart by the roots growing under its crust, and all its inhabitants were destroyed.

traits.locale_text: La colonia de Zarkov jamás podría haber resistido el poder de{mf|l| la} heraldo divin{mf|o|a} del fragmento: las raíces que crecían bajo la superficie del planeta lo destrozaron y todos sus habitantes fueron aniquilados.

languages.text: Zarkov'daki koloninin, Parça'nın ilahi habercisinin güçlerine direnme umudu yoktu. Gezegen, kabuğunun altında büyüyen köklerce parçalandı ve tüm sakinleri yok edildi.
languages.original_text: The colony on Zarkov had no hope of resisting the forces of the Shard's divine harbinger: the planet was torn apart by the roots growing under its crust, and all its inhabitants were destroyed.

traits.locale_text: Zarkov'daki koloninin, Parça'nın ilahi habercisinin güçlerine direnme umudu yoktu. Gezegen, kabuğunun altında büyüyen köklerce parçalandı ve tüm sakinleri yok edildi.

languages.text: Die Kolonie auf Zarkov hatte den Mächten des göttlichen Boten des Fragments nichts entgegenzusetzen. Der Planet wurde mit allen seinen Bewohnern von den Wurzeln unter seiner Kruste in Stücke gerissen.
languages.original_text: The colony on Zarkov had no hope of resisting the forces of the Shard's divine harbinger: the planet was torn apart by the roots growing under its crust, and all its inhabitants were destroyed.

traits.locale_text: Die Kolonie auf Zarkov hatte den Mächten des göttlichen Boten des Fragments nichts entgegenzusetzen. Der Planet wurde mit allen seinen Bewohnern von den Wurzeln unter seiner Kruste in Stücke gerissen.
